name: Zensun Enterprises Limited
summary: Zensun Enterprises Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development, property investment and management, and securities trading and investment businesses. The company also offers loan financing services. It has operations in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, Singapore, Japan, and the United States. The company was formerly known as ZH International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Zensun Enterprises Limited in July 2019. The company was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Zensun Enterprises Limited is a subsidiary of Joy Town Inc.
